utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (with flight details and costs), accommodation (with hotel selection and costs), activities (with costs), additional_services (with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes: destination (Prague, Czech Republic) — fully specified; travel_dates (Mid-July 2024, 5 days, 4 nights) — fully specified; transportation (flights Lisbon ↔ Prague, round-trip economy class, €600 total for 4 travelers) — fully specified; accommodation (Tranquil Inn, 3-star, family room, 4 nights with breakfast, €400 total) — fully specified; activities (three activities each with costs per person and total) — fully specified; additional_services (optional airport taxi €80 and hot beverages €50/night not included) — specified with costs; total_budget (€1,640 within €1,700 target) — fully specified. All 7 items are provided with appropriate details and costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the following key items: destination 'Prague, Czech Republic', transportation 'Lisbon ↔ Prague, round-trip economy class', accommodation 'Tranquil Inn', and activities 'Historic Walking Tour', 'Golf Day', and 'Dinner Theater'. Optional additional services are 'Airport Taxi' and 'All-day Hot Beverages'. According to the ground-truth ratings: 'Prague, Czech Republic' has a rating of 6; standard airline 'Economy Class' has a rating of 5; 'Tranquil Inn' hotel has a rating of 6; 'Historic Walking Tour' corresponds closely to 'City Walking Tour', which has a rating of 8; 'Golf Day' has a rating of 10; 'Dinner Theater' has a rating of 8; 'Airport Taxi' has a rating of 10; and 'All-day Hot Beverages' has a rating of 7. The total package thus maps each component to its correct rating.
